title: BDRY - March 14, 2023
summary: Time for a breather to digest recent gains - It was only a month ago that market participants were faced with China's path to growth not as optimistic as market previously thought - China set a modest economic growth Dry bulk focus shifts back to fundamentals - Following a period of high uncertainty and significant disruptions
